creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
tar(1) in 4.X gives error while extracting files from distfiles.

How-To-Repeat:   
# cd /usr/ports/games/linux-ut
# make
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Extracting for linux-ut-451
=> MD5 Checksum OK for linux-ut/unreal.tournament_436-multilanguage.run.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for linux-ut/unreal.tournament.official.bonus.pack.collection.run.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for linux-ut/UTPGPatch451.tar.bz2.

gzip: stdin: unexpected end of file
/usr/bin/tar: Child returned status 1
/usr/bin/tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/games/linux-ut.
